projects.title: UI GFX
projects.description: Interactive UI props for film, programmed for live on-set interaction (HTML/JavaScript web apps, with exploration into Rive for advanced motion graphics) to capture authentic actor performance without the need for post-production VFX replacements.

projects.title: HALFTXT
projects.description: A suite of client-side tools for creating ASCII art. Includes a media converter for converting images, GIFs, and video into color ASCII art and a frame-by-frame animator with export to WebM, MP4, HTML, and plain text — no backend, no dependencies.

projects.title: Unstick
projects.description: Unstick is a single-screen prompt generator for artists and makers who are stuck. Move the slider from gentle to chaos, get a task, do it.

projects.title: Petit Plaisir
projects.description: A beautifully designed personal menu builder that helps you curate and remember the activities that make you feel alive.

projects.title: Clearing
projects.description: A minimal home screen dashboard. Live weather, the time, and a quiet way to launch any app, without distraction.

projects.title: Feeed Studio
projects.description: Generate a fake Instagram feed: upload images, crop to IG ratios, auto-fill usernames, captions and likes, then download as PNG.

projects.title: Vibe Color
projects.description: Generate beautiful color palettes from your mood. Describe how you feel, get five colors that capture the vibe.

projects.title: Vibe Check
projects.description: Keep your brand visually consistent with AI-powered image analysis and scoring.
